Professional Experience.name: Therap (BD) Ltd.
Professional Experience.summary: Lead quality assurance efforts for the video redaction system to develop and implement comprehensive test plans and cases to validate machine learning algorithms used in video processing. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and resolve complex bugs, significantly improving system reliability.

Professional Experience.name: Pathao Limited
Professional Experience.summary: Developed 5 key performance indicators (KPIs) and metrics for brand health measurement of Pathao Courier, aligning with company-wide strategic goals. Designed and implemented comprehensive questionnaires using data-driven methodologies to assess brand health metrics, improving response quality and depth of insights.

volunteer.organization: IEEE, University of Dhaka Student Branch
volunteer.summary: Organized several workshops, interactive sessions and industry expert experience sharing sessions.
Conducted robotics workshops in multiple high schools and developed engaging quizzes for BdRO.
Designed and delivered lessons on classification algorithms and evaluation metrics for a group of 10 high school students, and created quizzes to assess their understanding.
